review_body_text: A typical day at work and i believe i've learned a lot of skills such as communicating, more time managing and stuff like that and the work place is rwally good

review_title: Work culture is good, learning a lots, getting lots of knowledge of product.
review_body_text: Having teatime among us, celebration birthday and also we will do decorations for all the festivals...team work is going well with team members, management is good❤️ Together progress 🙂

review_title: Stressful if cannot hit sales target
review_body_text: Management will keep pushing for sales even though the product is not great and detrimental to buyers. Micro-management will happen if u dont hit ur target

The work environment in the department varies from all function. For me, I am under the Group Internal Audit function. The environment is not bad. My CIA and Head of Department is great, however I will say otherwise for my current supervisor
Could be working from home most of the time. It depends on the manager, some require the staffs to work from office. some department are more flexible.

Very poor management. Not welcoming the newcomers. Unproper training. Expect us to get the highest more KPI than in JD. Leads not approachable. Sometimes they just recycle the leads to call the same customer. They will pressuring you until you resigned on your own.

Not support newcommer.On a personal level, they are approachable and supportive, creating a friendly and collaborative environment. They genuinely care about the team’s well-being and motivate us with positivity and encouragement. This balance of professionalism and human touch makes working under them both inspiring and enjoyable

review_title: Moderate work load, not So much benefit , but still free of mind
review_body_text: If you need to a higher career development and lots benefits, can option with other company. But if you want to go for a reasonable and just normal job free of mind can go to here
good working environment but slow pace. many approval structure , compliances and hierarch to meet. very tedious job . But the people is fun and willing to share the experiences.

What is the best part of working at the company? The best part of working at RHB was the supportive work environment and strong teamwork among colleagues. The management encouraged growth, provided continuous training, and valued employees’ contributions, making it a great place to build a long term career. What is the most stressful part about working at the company? As with any banking role, there were moments of pressure during peak periods or when meeting targets, but the management and team support made it manageable. The challenges helped me build resilience and improve my time management skills. What is the work environment and culture like at the company? The work culture was friendly, supportive, and team driven. Everyone worked together towards common goals, and the management valued hard work and integrity. What is a typical day like for you at the company? Every day was focused on serving clients, achieving sales goals, and supporting the team. It was a busy but enjoyable routine that kept me motivated and constantly learning.

review_title: informative yet surface level exposure towards nature of business
review_body_text: prepare monthly reporting tasks and mostly does market research. Does offer hybrid working style, imcludes activities like townhall, learning week, team building, and upskilling depending on the department.
job_title: Asset Management Strategy and Business Analysis

review_body_text: Good environment, good salary, will give u experience, but compared to other commercial bank, rhb is like medium. Not many clients will prefer rhb. The name is not top.
Overall not bad. Lack increment and bonus. Working hour not flexible. Not good to stay for a long time. Working environment can be improved. Team members are good.

No increment, not offered as permanent position even though work more than 3years, low benefit. It is not wrong to use the offer contract thru agency but if the employee already work more than 1 year with a good results, offer them permanent position.
The trust is given by allowing you to empower the action to complete your work & you are able to work from home. I hope for a better insurance benefit for dependents & salary base.
Normal working hours but beed to work weekends with no overtime pay at all. Commisions are ok but lower than other banks. Would be nice to have help from top management for new staff

Dont really like the benefits they offer especially in terms of commision. They would claw back 20% of the comm and only give it to u after 1 year. Its a way for them to hold their staff to not resign.
The location is near the public access which is good, training and script is given and the colleague is helpful. The every single day work is basically the have same routine.

Working as Collector is hard as doing Sales for bank. They offered a contract position. Even top performer is hard to secure a permanent position. You need to achieved all the monthly target so you can stay respected. Need to stay back without paying OT. Because they are paying commission if you hit the monthly target.
cons_text: Need to stay back without pay OT.

review_title: have experience deal with customer, quality management and time handling.
review_body_text: What is the best part of working at the company? They provided staff engagement event and activities What is the most stressful part about working at the company? Must to find customer salary basic above 3k to get better achievement but in kedah and penang most workers basic 1.5k What is the work environment and culture like at the company? a positive workplace culture is one that is built on meaningful work, open communication, and core values. What is a typical day like for you at the company? On my average day of work, I start the day off by checking my emails. This way, I can reply to clients and get everything organized at the start of the day. I then look over my to-do list and get started on the day that have my top priority.

review_title: Workplace and culture are very good
review_body_text: What is the best part of working at the company? Good environment and management What is the most stressful part about working at the company? Nothing stressful for me. I take has a challenge and enhance my work skill. What is the work environment and culture like at the company? The staff and taller very helpful and good place to enhance skill and also good for your career What is a typical day like for you at the company? Wednesday because every Wednesday is a briefing day
Fast and Easy interview and hiring process Flexible working hour as sales person Friendly Colleague Low commission compare to other banks Slow system for loan submission
Pros:- - Able to develop relevant experience - Friendly colleagues - Plenty of trainings for sales staff Cons:- - Micromanage on daily basis - Management practice favouritism - Subpar bonuses
A typical work place with great colleagues and manager in guiding the work flow. Salary was on par on the position applied. Benefits were great for big company.
With thorough guidance and resilient, every job made possible. The culture can be improved with good leader and cooperation. Initiatives for better working environment should be implimented.

review_title: a good start for fresh grad who are willing to work under stress
review_body_text: work under minimal supervision as long as you are able to hit the KPI set by the management good manager and supervisor makes my work easier as they are willing to help me seek for approval with cases that require higher up to issue

What is the best part of working at the company? Among colleagues ok, management not good What is the most stressful part about working at the company? HQ management and HQ support not enough What is the work environment and culture like at the company? Working environment ok, culture not so good

What is the best part of working at the company? RHB take care of staffs and give good benefit What is the most stressful part about working at the company? Doing sales is the most stressful part What is the work environment and culture like at the company? RHB created happy and enjoy environment What is a typical day like for you at the company? At branch, meet customer and give best service to customer

Good bonus. Workload is manageable, although at times it can be quite heavy. Flexi working hours. Most colleagues are helpful and professional, although there will be some bad apples (which can be found in any company tbh)

review_title: No work life balance, stressful and so much pressure
review_body_text: The work environment were stressful and pressure. Forcefully have to OT on weekdays without paid! Need to work on Sunday 2 times per month so overall you just have 2 days of offday per month.

review_title: Agile title but with old mindset, spent too much customization on legacy system instead of determine to revamp it
review_body_text: If want to explore, have to be mentally prepared with unnecessary approvals, overprocess of workflow for the sake of governance and fairly decaded legacy system that is counterproductive and isn't align with the latest development of technology(Datalake, Big Data, OCR, Robotic, AI, Chatgpt) . Spent a lot of time for manual activities due to reluctant to invest a new system, continue waste money for customization on incompetent system which only safeguard vendor evergreen businesses.
pros_text: Discounted rate for company cafeteria, tentative work from home policy, learning programme
cons_text: People mindset, processes, legacy systems, pay and promotion

review_body_text: You will learn how to “tai-chi” in this company. From HR to all other department. Each department only knows their own product instead of knowing all.

Working environment and collaborative colleagues are positive that push you forward to the limit. Although, some of the reviewer said that the employee's benefits are below the industry benchmarking, but I can see that the Management has been working to improve it accordingly. The working pace in a banking sector is vibrant and demanding hence there are rigorous regulatory reportings have to be made.
Fix increment yearly, perks for staff, hospitalisation, dental, permanent position, work from home, positive working environment, need to achieve target.
Nice. Learn how to negotiate different type of customer. Manager will guide you A to Z. Just follow the flow setup by your manager. You will learn how to manage your time management skills.

review_title: If you have experiences, try somewhere else
review_body_text: Very unprofessional from team manager up to higher management lvl. Buli staff all the way eventho they made mistakes n didnt admit it. Not recommended
cons_text: Too many to list down. If you preffered working like a robot, can try this

review_body_text: Learn various things during my period, got the supportive supervisor and good working environment. But the salary is a bit low for the fresh grade in order to compare with others banking company
Good colleagues at the branches , bad management. Sales could be challenging here, as the products are not really competitive. Turnover rate is high.

review_title: Working at sales centre in shopping mall is quite fun.
review_body_text: > easy to meet customer from walk-in > flexible lunch time > working following retail operation time > having shift rotation > banking industry but in retail culture
pros_text: Have allowance and good medical insurance
cons_text: No OT and working in every public holiday since working as sales consultant

review_body_text: The most enjoyable part of the job is people to guide you and some genuine people around. Overall in Ipoh if working in banking can lived a good life but work life balance not sure because too packed with task. Overall fine to work in bank under sales department.
cons_text: Concall in the morning will pulled your mood

review_body_text: The compliance review team was responsible for numerous annual, bi-annual, thematic and ad-hoc reviews. Luckily teamwork is awesome but can't say the same about the manager and salary.
Good place to work but quite hierarchical due to the large size of the organisation. If you are looking for career progression, you’ll need to serve the time and slowly work your way up.
Good salary , Good Environment, No work life Balance, Opportunity to learn, good training , No career growth, Good team work, good Benefits and compensation
Nice workplace. No life balance. Can get more incentive of you work hard. If you lucky then u can get a nice TL to work with. He/she will guide you from zero to something

Best to work with colleagues. The environment is depends on your team leader and colleagues. KPI hard to achieve but once achieved the feeling cannot be described. No OT given but they ask you to do OT. Stayback almost everyday. Not suitable for family person.
Ok ok , not so good for sales target, always pressure about target from upper management ,for trying is ok but for long term is not suitable because based on target
Busy but manageable. The environment is good. All the team was very helpful. Good place to work. However they just simply terminated all the contract staff without notice

place to gain experience and improving skills competitive career enhancement strict on compliance and penalty on the lapses job done good platform for your better career opportunities with other employer

review_title: Fun workplace but u need to achieve you target first.
review_body_text: very politic working environment. good manager will get good working environment. but selfish manager u will get bad working environment. RHB Management is very good except the manager. be careful with the soft spoken people ya. Good commission when u hit the target. but if u're not achieve your minimum target and the minimum percentage, your commission will be burn.

Most underpaid staff in malaysia’s banking sector. If ure looking for a high salary, RHB is not the right place to work. People with spm got more salary than those who had degree because of the union. Even clerk got more salary than exec. Totally unfair.
Cons -Average benefit -Low salary -Micromanagement -High turnover -office politics Pros -hybrid working -supportive colleagues -near public transport -good place for newjoiners
Environment is okay but no work life balance. Have toxic people and have a good friends. OT claim on PH and weekend. Everyday must STAYBACK and must come to office last 2 weeks saturday

mostly working with young people in my department - fun. works are ok but no work life balance when chasing SLA. not enough head counts and workloads. mgt dont care enough abt you after you told them your concerns many times. workflow changes at times
Overall good. good salary, good teamwork. fresh graduate can join to get experience. selling personal loan, credit cards, asb and many more depend on your branch
Good colleague but very challenging for staff without experience. No proper on job training before start working. Need to take care of sales and disbursements. Can't full focus on sales hunting.

Typical local company culture. Want everything but cant deliver everthing. The manager not supportive, the support need to repay back. Aggressively push for target without considering the market condition and situation
Staff are friendly and kind heart to help out, especially to newbies. Great place to learn, but for sales you have to be good in dealing with stress.
Depends on your department/job scope, employer offer Hybrid Working Arrangements. There are schedule that you may take based on your preferences. Really helps on these days.
Fast paced Demanding at work Strong team bonding You are able to raise your ideas to boss for improvement. Adequate training provided to equip knowledge to carry out the task.
Chinese dominant, poor benefits,long working hours, disparity..no work life balance..facilities not that great..not much scope for growth and not paid as per performance

review_title: It's all about sales and money
review_body_text: If you think you're fine without work life balance, then this is your place. If you think you can control your mental health, then this is your place.
Work until 9pm. (Should be around 6pm) No pay ot Also work on weekend Early depo before enter job RM100+(Deduct from salary) No OT pay No OT pay Not follow Act of employee
cons_text: Culture, Team Leader, Work Life Balance

review_body_text: Pros: Flex office hours Cons: Salary too low for executive and manager level To improve salary scale for managers and executives level thnks .

review_title: It was great working at the company
review_body_text: Mostly i enjoyed working in the company with great people. I love the position as a spend management executive. However, the salary for the job specification and skills was insufficient
Very bad culture and lots of politic among team members and also management level. Refrain from joining risk division. Require to polish shoes in order to get promotion.
Good working environtment. Friendly colleagues. Willing to help. Team work is excellent. Boss is willing to guide and help when necessary. Really enjoy working here.

Matured culture where is it result based. Can take leave easily, no questions asked. Nobody disturb after working hours except scheduled deployment event. Healthy team who helped each others ' growth. Lots of makan2. Pretty pantry with facilities. Gyms. Clinics. Unlimited medical benefits.

The worst place to work, selfish surroundings, unfair evaluation, meeting during lunch time, reporting till late night, on call 7days per week. Communication breakdown between regional sales head and subordinate.
cons_text: Force to pass Target and meeting morning at places more than >50km

review_body_text: I am so gladful that i have been able working in here as i received so much benefits and possesed so many useful skills, as well as maintaining patience during solving cases. Working here also taught me to be self-reliant and critical thinking while assisting customers on field. Plus, i had a good leader who has been patiently guide me step by step, which inspired me not to give up easily.
cons_text: Not many option for food stalls

review_body_text: Working with rhb is pretty exciting. Hybrid working environment. Have bonus even salary is a bit low compared to other banks in the market. Working in aml TM is a very fast paced. Need to meet daily target
pros_text: Hybrid working environment.only 2 days in office the rest at home
cons_text: A bit Stressful with the new management

review_body_text: Great experience working here. Great colleagues and environment. Lots of workload but everyone were happy working there. All were helpful and friendly.

review_title: High workload, Toxic workplace, low work life balance
review_body_text: Working as part of their sales executive and i gonna said it such a high pressure, toxic workplace to work at. They don't even provide me with a my own workplace as i had to share it with everyone else. The team in here are such a toxic workmates as they all gossiping and being loud and rude to each other. I wish they make a better change on the management part to be more work friendly place.
all well good nice experience working experience good...famiky environment..but living in klang valley the paid will be not enough due to cost living.....

Productive Industry, i love it. Best management and best staffs. Hope can get best position again such as Branch Manager or Area Manager. I've submitted my cv for the management to view... After left RHB , now my education qualification is Ex Master in Business Administration.
Doing Sale with RHB Bank is the best moment that i ever have because at RHB Bank i can make a lot of money. Have a good teamwork and good leader to guide me as a junior staff.

review_title: if you can work under pressure, you can work here
review_body_text: Very little opportunity for growth. Good incentives. Low work life balance. Work under pressure to achieve monthly target. Friendly colleague. Low salary compared to other companies.

review_title: Good workplace to start as a freshie.
review_body_text: Really good experience. Must be active & fast learner to be there. As csa, you need to figure it out the solutions for the problems but dont worry, the staffs were friendly & very helpful. Medium range for the pay.
Simply very torturing TL. Always torturing to do other team's work. But never paid extra to the extra work we do for that other team . Never get relaxed break.
High workload, low compensation. Low in term of staff appreciation. Unsystematic management. High stress. Improper training. Low increment & bonus. Need to be more independent to learn
its a good place to work. management is okay. the learning curve is steep and challenging at times. environment is okay but it depends on the department you work for.
The team members are professional at work but collaborative when needed. The hardest part is where the branch does not being cooperative enough for some of the matters arises
cons_text: Call volume to staff ratio is not balance

review_title: A lot of monthly business presentations
review_body_text: I left the bank because my responsibilities entailed a lot of travelling to branches. My main responsibility was to ensure each branch met the desired business targets as required . If budgeted business was not achieved, I would be queried, being the Head of the entire region.
Good working environment with colleagues. Team focus more on sales, as there was a target that need to be achieved. When one haven't achieved yet, team will help others to achieve the sales target.

I enjoy working here as it has work life balance and good benefits.i love it all but only the salary.i think i am not being paid enough.The trainings given are good and the facilities provided are good
pros_text: good colleague and bosses, benefits, career growth

review_body_text: People are friendly. Boss is nice. There is career advancement opportunities. Perhaps management can improve on work life balance and compensation..

Target oriented job. Everyday talk about sales. A very stressful job. Manager off during weekends but you have to go work at branch, outlet or at roadshow. Almost everytime your work expense claim are rejected by your superior. You loss more than you gain at this company.

review_title: High turnover people come and go
review_body_text: Back office perspective Toxic environment Abundant workload The pay is low not worth it for entry level. .
cons_text: Short breaks. Boss expect you are a robot.

review_title: Fast-paced workplace that emphasize collaboration between coworkers
review_body_text: Not much to say since I was there not for a long time but overall it was pretty nice. For a contractor like me, there are no bonuses or perks so I don't know much about it. Standard pros and cons working at a bank

review_title: Not a good place at all
review_body_text: A typical day at work getting threatened to finish a task that is impossible to finish. Management wants unrealistic and unachievable goals when they pay you low and not even pay overtime. Any ideas will not be taken seriously and management will just dismiss them. The salary range is also too low for a company boasting about being in the top 4 bank ranking list in Malaysia and its seemingly high profits. No matter how hard you work, and even if you get high KPI the annual bonus will not be based on the KPI, makes me wonder why is it even there on the first place.

review_title: Good team members, they will guide you.
review_body_text: Good team members, they will guide you. Free training and free lunch. Learning more about the new technologies. Politics and toxic, turnover rate is high.
Very very hard to get promotion especually working in non sale job. Back office work usually is working long hours and even during weekend. Hard to get overtime.
cons_text: No being well reward even when you have study hard.

review_title: Really enjoy collaboration with all the staff and vendors especially the business clients.
review_body_text: Really honoured being service here's almost 5 years with great team great experience great journey towards my excellent future. Good facility such as gym, parking space, sports facility, clinic, hostels and so on.
job_title: IT Business Analyst• IT Project Management Office

review_title: Not a good company to work at
review_body_text: Had to sacrifice my weekend and AL to attend to work related matters. Most importantly the pay is very low and bonus & increment is extremely low and doesn’t compensate our workload
cons_text: Low pay and too much workload

review_body_text: Otherwise okay. Stressful and need to work hard to achieve target. Nad approval rate as we need to achieve 650k every month. The good thing blacklist customer can do p/loan.
cons_text: Lousy management and difficult to achieve as they decrease approval rate.

review_body_text: Supportive leaders and team makes the job even better. Salary paid fair enough with the job scope. But need to have extra miles since the crowd and market quite lesser compared to some other banks
nothing to say as all are okay but a bit stress to achieve the target towards end of the month. the teamwork and colleagues are awesome and team leader are the best and very helpful

review_title: A better carrier growth and can learn other technologies
review_body_text: - Unprofessional management not Supportive managers and team leads - Toxic culture - long working hours & weekends - Manual process - Lack of manpower

review_title: Enjoy with workplace and helpful team
review_body_text: Not much to say.. but im happy working rhb team as their helpful cheerful and always work with no complaining. Love to work with rhb cmpany. under sales of coz target important but im not stressful coz branch always work under 1 team
Good team lead who always there if you need help. However, they provide low salary. If they can provide higher. It will be better. Overall management is good
Thanks for your support and I'm glad worked there more 23years finally I took VSs....thank you so much, because of I'm survive and had decent family and life ..thank you again..
cons_text: Senior staf are bias and very selfish on sharing knowledge.

review_title: Poor management from the first month join into the company. Lack of empathy shown by the manager
review_body_text: Not a good company because too much turnover. The management is too poor. Need to review the training program and how they hire the leader to guide the team. The leader always call staff at night
no life, do not enjoy working, work stress, long working hours, difficult to get leave (leave conditions must meet the target), boss who is too strict without any mercy.

review_title: in overall, it's really stressful working in RHB as there's no work life balance at all. Have to work late at night and over the weekend
review_body_text: 1) No work life balance 2) When any big issue happened, there must be someone to be blamed instead of to find the solution 3) Management seems don't want to understand the root cause of any issues 4) Lack of teamwork between the department 5) To seek cooperation from the other team and to get management's understanding on certain issues 6) if we get rewarded accordingly
I had fun working here. Got an experience. Also got benefit. The team was so Nice to each orhers. Thank you for give me this appotunities to work here.
it not fair for pemanent status brobation 6 month not extend another 3 months. it should be must give changes for staff to prove the company that he can do if management extend another 3 month
i really enjoy working at there.i learning something new at there,all friendly staff,i regret so much because of my resign.i like mdm kavitha. she a really such us wonderful soul.
Good local bank and very friendly and experience college . They are there to guide you . Bank having good benefit compare other company
We have now adopted the Agile way of working which has proven to be effective. Teamwork has improved. Team members take ownership of their work and collaborate more effectively.
pros_text: Casual dressing for those departments which have flipped to Agile

review_body_text: Bad attitude of Sales manager, poor leadership skills leads to bullying and bad culture. It is a very stressful enviroment for staffs easy. I dont have the right to choose my own Mandate too and verbally request the junior staff to work on their only offday.

review_title: Most regret to join in RHB
review_body_text: Everything are mess. Dun have proper department to teach new staff. During training also didnt follow the schedules. The course arranging is really horrible. I never expect the bank will provide this kind of lousy training.

Fun working environment. The work dealing customer quite stressful. Colleagues are helpful. Training on all the product should lengthen. Too many products to be covered within short time. Maybe product specialization could be better

Work more than 8 hours No OT claim Forced to work till 9pm Salary will be calculated upto 6pm only Stressful environment Lunch break will be 1 hour Short break will be 15 minutes Basic + low commission given Most of the time work on weekends too to achieve target
pros_text: Friendly unit head and team leader
cons_text: Worst senior who doesn't help the new joinee

review_body_text: Rhb is quite a good financial company bit sometime management may miss out the important things in daily basis which mean the facilities and also training for staff

review_title: high stress level but with positive challenges
review_body_text: - flexible time - banking system - good management - less activity to contract staff - high target every month - learned about banking system and job
Great work place full of colour and culture. Job specification is clear to be done. The management ia an open door practice. Provide fairness benefit between exec and clerk level.

it's a stressfull and unbalance worklife, noneffective management with slow action taking in solving problems. Management only focus with profitable area but less care about quality in every area especially in customer service area.
bonus given not to bad good colleagues sometimes work can be overwhelming due to staff shortage good culture overall some parts of building needs to be revamped

review_title: What i get at RHB bank
review_body_text: What i learn from this company is how to sell product and how to controll relationship between client. how to face problem then how i make solution. Rhb is one of the company With good management and it was amazing has work at this company.
Join in rhb banking group and you will know how you can work with your colleagues such as a leader, team leader, team partner in growth the business of rhb group

RHab is one good upcoming bank and provide lot opportunities to workers and carrier wise all staff can develop the skills of work. RHB also help staff by introduce good rate for personal loan to customer so it can help all the staff to achieve the sales Target permonth by slow and steady.

I learned so many things about bank culture. i learned how to attract customer , to handle customer , and processing application customer when they apply for bank services. for me the teammates is so fun but a bit stress when you got the very fussy customer. so overrall for me this company so good.

review_title: Work life balance/ engaging colleagues/ good workplace environment
review_body_text: The most enjoyable part on this job is teamwork. All employees including manager will help each other to make sure all employees reach their target on a monthly basis. In addition, manager also give some encouraging words to make sure their staff always positive and work more harder without give up until all employees achieve the target.
didnt take care of staff's benefits, over pressure staff, bias and unable to provide better training to those in need didnt provide the commission as promised. underpaid the staff.
salesperson get less benefits annual leave lesser compare to other bank medical benefit less culture quite difficult seniority always come first system. old
best teammate with best leader but mostly start with contract staff and not easy to be permanent staff. can gain more knowledge about financing and banking system

review_title: Best for people who want to gain experience in sales.
review_body_text: The most enjoyable part on this job is teamwork. All employees including manager will help each other to make sure all employees reach their target on a monthly basis. In addition, manager also give some encouraging words to make sure their staff always positive and work more harder without give up until all employees achieve the target.
Because workplace is not flexible and the salary per hour not high. And currently all the work is very easy and no any difficult, and I would like to work with US employers.

review_title: Overall the team that I worked with provide unlimited support a d great learning experience in completing my task
review_body_text: Good learning experience and overall the team either within the Group or at Regional level provides the best supprt anyone can ask for; tremendous momentum to ensure the best effort are being done.

- positive environment - big organisation - communication with customer - different workplace culture - information benefit of product - the hardest part of the job is to convince the customer of benefit of product

review_title: I love this company untill i die...
review_body_text: The best experiences in my entire working experiences. The boss will be boss the staff are so cheerfull and full off plastic. I love LOVE LOVE LOVE X 100 MILLION love. Thank You so much RHB BANK BHD. .... Tq tq tq

Really appreciate get great experience.lovely environment.Friendly colleagues.if get opportunity will appreciate a show more of talent. wonderful job culture and flexible working hours.No stress and earning as we like

review_title: Had a great time by exploring myself to a new environment
review_body_text: Able to communicate with freedom.moreover get to learn and done a task individually and super fast.The platform gave a great experience to feel the work place dilemma and the way to solve the consequences with confident.
job_title: Consumer product and collection recovery departmen

review_body_text: High performance team Fairly rewarded Great team members Work life balance Close relationship with superior Good remuneration package Great location Great facilities for staff

review_title: Productive and have good balance working time
review_body_text: Very nice happy working area with good benefits in too many ways such as staff welfare, health care, get lowest interest loan. Besides, the surrounding more calm as its located at sub area.
very good handling staff need and wants. very patient with staff complaints and need good remuneration great and conducive workplace enjoyable environment
Work culture & environment is so friendly and different from other banks. The career path is good if you perform in the task given. Salary will be given based on your experienced.

review_title: Had a good experience of working in banking line
review_body_text: Working in banking line was no easy but I learned a lot for it .. and I have achieve my targets most of the month and it was really a great experience And I have a good team leader to Guide me and my progress was shows very good

We are the 1st bank using workplace like FB apps. My 1st experience seeing a lot people sharing work information instantly and you will get the latest info instant and fast from all different department. I was enjoy been select as talent management member to be learn guide lead and grown my career in RHB.
pros_text: A lot reward voucher to be rewarded

review_title: Good and fun environment to work
review_body_text: Good leader, supportive colleague, good package and above all good staff engagement. nothing much to talk, still so new after graduation, and good learning environment
Good company to work with. Helpful manager and cheerful team members. Have a good life experiebce on how to handle our own personal financial plans. Good place to work in
The management takes care of their employees very well. Bosses are down to all employees and employees can walk in to their bosses at anytime to discuss on the work matter or even personal issues.
Working at bank is good with their benefits, but the cooperation within each staff is worst. Teamwork is only for sometimes. Always need to be reminded.

It's 5 days work with rotating shift. Lots of staff but less working equipment. The hardest job is to convince customers and meet their satisfaction. Some customers are gems of person but there are few arrogant but its fun to deal with each of them. Every single day is a new and fresh day and those happened the day before shouldn't be brought today. That's how we work.

review_title: Challenging, experience on dealing with customer
review_body_text: Knows how to tackle the situation based on the training given. Be familiar with bank products and services Need to be extra careful to handle difficult customer.

review_title: used to be a great company
review_body_text: There is much focus and emphasis on making sure staff succeed in the company.Responsible for so much work.overtime not allowed but employer wanna job to be done
Learning about contact centre environement. Understand the principle behind contact centre in banking industry. Overall working experience is good. Really enjoyed

RHB Bank Berhad for me is a place giving me a lot of experience about how to handle customer. Position as a Sales Consultant taught me to improve my communication skills, give a good service before and after sales and how to attract customer. Its all about how you handle customer. Workplace culture is so enjoyable, all the staff very friendly and help each others. The hardest part of the job is when you are struggle to find customer and attract customer to trust you and product.

Working the the bank industry forcing as the banker to always up to date with the current nation economy. Despite the economy progression were slow at the time, everything was in good hand since it is monitor under the Bank Negara and Ministry of finance. Work routine, have to meet up with client especially with the company entities. Along the way I've learned the structure of the financial industry in general and depth. As for the management are well structure and organize, thus it also allow the worker to learn new thing. As for the most enjoyable part of the job is that I was able to build a networking with other.
pros_text: There are classes to equipt ourselves with finance knowledge.

review_body_text: Good place to work and learn about financing, accounting and great place to develop your skills. The environment is good. They have a very good learning center that provided to new and current working to be better and more prepare
Good place to work. Typical bank industry environment. To complete volume and SLA at tight dateline. Need to work fast and at long hours. Able to learn new products.
Enormous surau & great cafe. Variety of choices from mamak to malay to chinese to western. I love the environment there. A clinic is on ground floor only.
cons_text: HQ located at Jalan Tun Razak. Bad traffic during peak hour.

review_body_text: -challenging, fast paced and great learning opportunity especially for fresh graduate -great platform to learn and get the experience -helpful employees

review_title: Banking Company & feel like home at company
review_body_text: Working in RHB its very cool and friendly colleagues. I learn in RHB, banking domain knowledge, especially Corporate banking sector. In technical learned some new concepts and documentations. Management is very cool. Workplace culture fun and helping. No hardest in this job, If I donno will search in google or ask my colleagues. In business part refer docs and technical part search in google. Daily enjoying at my workplace.
Good environment and too many opportunity to carrier growth. A new culture been applied Easy to park your car or motocycle Near to KLCC Easy to do work as officemate very friendly

review_title: Very good place to gain knowledge and experience
review_body_text: provide outstanding service to RHB Bank customers by answering questions, handling complaints, and troubleshooting problems with our products and services. we may handle a high volume of inbound or outbound calls or both and should seek to create a positive experience for each caller. we will listen to clients to understand the reason for their call, address all questions or complaints, and provide an accurate and efficient response.
cons_text: Basic salary still lower than the other local bank

review_body_text: Nice working environment & good benefit. Can get a better career & experience in RHB. In sales line of course have a different challenge but in RHB i’ve create a sweet memory with achievements travelling, get voucher, ein a campaign and so on.
- working more than 12 hours without OT - Good place to earn knowledge on banking line - workplace is good - no life balance because need to work until 9 pm and more also on weekend.

review_title: Good advancement for career and base for learning
review_body_text: RHB Bank is one of the leading bank for the employee who wish to start their career in financial sector. The Bank provide the staff a good platform in corporate world especially in financial discipline. The workplace culture is god and convenient. The hardest part of the job is when you have to settle all the urgent and important matters at once. The most enjoyable part of the job is that you are being appreciated and satisfied that all the job will be done in due process and also chance to learn from the other stakeholder or businesses.
RHB is a very good company in malaysia to work with colleagues, environment and hard working.Everybody mostly prefer to work such type of company.But it's bit far

review_title: Productive and Fun Place to work
review_body_text: - Challenging Job - Able to build a fresh network of customer base - Able to explore various business market - Teamwork is essential - the hardest part of the job is meet monthly minimum target
pros_text: Fun working environment, Sufficient break time
cons_text: Stressful, Too many Products, High monthly Target

review_body_text: I gave my entire career working upwards from a graduate trainee till the Senior Vice President level. I was forced to accept a golden handshake not because i was incompetent to lead a strong Loan Recovery team, my unquestionable integrity didn't sit well with one vocal shareholder who also a board of director member. As Head of Recovery, our task to maximise recovery and recalcitrant borrowers we have to punish.. i punished one by winding them up which irked this director as i did it on his friend's company. The rest was history..
job_title: Senior Vice President, Head of Loan Recovery

review_body_text: Good place to work with and to learn new things which will be the stepping stone for career enhancement. Engagement with various stakeholder gave more exposure and knowledge sharing.

The office provide games such as dart, pool, PS4 and congkak to release tension. It also have mini gym like treadmill, & boxing sandbag. 1Malaysia's environment, we got Malay, Chinese, & India staffs mixed with foreign people from oversea.

review_title: not a great place to work
review_body_text: learned how to talk with customer the hardest part of the job is facing management normal working rouutine not recommended for career but good for gaining experience
i love the most how this company manage their staff and in term of how the benefit given to the staff like monthly meeting with RD, managers and staff from other branch

review_title: handling multi-tasking works, independent, be a good player in approach walk in customer or potential customer whose come in to the braanch.
review_body_text: Need to focus on the daily operation on saling of banking's product, Debit card, general and life insurance, personal loans and asb loans. i also need to make sure to attend all customer with good manner and ensure all original documents need to give them back. I also need to make sure any information or supporting document from customer need to keep in file. Need to achieve monthly target and ensure all complaints from customer are resolved.

review_title: The hardest part of the job
review_body_text: Is have to achieve the target given which very challenging every months . Also most off the time spend is on the office . You will gain a lot of knowledge during this work which very helpful in future .

review_title: get more experience and a good working environment
review_body_text: working in my rhb company gets more knowledge and knowledge, my colleagues are very helpful and help each other. There I was also trained to be a very important subject to disilplin and to maintain trust or to be more responsible in carrying out my duties.

Encourage to achieve targets set by management. Fun work environment, got variety of race, good relationship among staff, a lot of cultural events,birthday celebrations organised. Supportive management where always organise meetings with managers/team supervisors, teamwork in achieving target for high incentives and pay.
cons_text: working late night and weekend without OT and double pay, the whole incentives will be burn if no target achieve.

review_body_text: An established organisation, have been around for a while. Too many long service employees that have difficulty in adopting changes. Too much unnecessary paperwork. Overwhelmed with volumes that takes away feeling of accomplishment.
pros_text: Easy accessed to cafe, surau & coffee outlets

review_body_text: nice counter and attractive decoration. can see many customer walk in but sometime get not quality customer. giving good benefit to staff. Waiting customer visiting counter to sign up services. But if the monthly target not hit, we have to find more customer outside. And have to study a lot of product and services.
pros_text: easly to reach counter because near to public transport
cons_text: Suddenly always have to attain meeting with management

review_body_text: first week and end of week can't take annual leave. stress target has to achieve to get incentives. if you not achieve, must stay back till night. if still not achieve tomorrow has to pass the previous figure. for me is was great environment , friend and work must have ability negotiations high level to achieve goal. I leave because want to gain more experience.

review_title: Productive & need to achieve target set by management
review_body_text: Working in Mortgage Department requireS to do everything fast & accurate. One tiny mistake will cost a lot to bank, that why need to check & ensure everything is in order before approve the loan documentation before move to next step. Working as teamwork are important in my team, we can share idea, problems & try to solve together. Bonding between team mate are good so that we can reduce the level of stress when we faced high work loads. Management also give rewards such bonuses, promotion, meet & greet with subordinates which made the staffs feel motivated to work harder
pros_text: Flexible on lunch time, flexible on clock in & out, annual leave

review_title: Fun workplace with a good team work
review_body_text: RHB Bank Berhad is company where you can earn more with your hardwork. A good teamwork, workplace, and environment. When you achieve their target you can get award from RHB. Every year you have target to achieve and different award to win.
The working environment is good, however need to improve the managent issues. The management line is outdated and sometimes causing problem to sales staff.

The work environment start with a happy mood but it then will quickly change to stressful when we start to do it our jobs because we have a target every hour how much account that we need to contact. I learned how to used Microsoft Excel and Microsoft words they also provide a system that used to check balance in customer account. I've also have been through some training and Test with RHB.
cons_text: No health care, No MC or leave for contract staff

review_body_text: Courage me to achieve targets set by management. Fun work environment where a lot of cultural events,birthday celebrations organised by recreational club. Supportive management where always organise meetings with managers/team supervisors.

review_title: This company is very good name. And working in this place very nice
review_body_text: For me working as to take for experince is very good. And i working here very happy. For fresh graduate i sugget to work this company to make your metality strong and learn to control stress and work very hard.

review_title: Many Paper To do at bank after banking hours
review_body_text: This issue we already told HQ, but they never change it. They always say need to paper less at your job, but everytime we want to paper less there is not gonna happen, Example Doing a FD placement to customer there already using 6 paper in that FD placement, 2 is the placement paper then GMPC then Product Disclosure Sheet already in 6 pages at FD, how we want to paper less, and that is many issue in the bank, that why I'm not continue work at bank already.

review_title: Productive , team building & enjoy with the commission earned
review_body_text: When I was looking for a new job , Rhb was at the top of my list . Rhb provides great opportunities to work on banking sector. I would encourage leadership to continue getting delegating to Director and Manager level employees to avoid slowing things down. We also have work to do to ensure that our sales aren't going dropped. I've had a lot of jobs before that I worked really hard, but didn't feel like I had an impact. I've been able to use my skills to get ahead here. When I've wanted to take on different responsibilities, I've been able to do those with help from my Leadership and teams. I feel like I've been here for a good amount of time and I've had opportunities to advance myself and learn about my potential. management is helpful, the work is interesting and growth is tremendous. I have worked at RHB for almost 6 years, and play the role as a sales executive and promote to be a assistant sales manager. The growth opportunity for these 6 years with the fun, hard working environment, and the ability to make as much money as you want is like no other job I have ever had.
pros_text: Flexible lunch hour and able to claim mileage & phone bill every month
cons_text: Working hour more than 8hours & one day off day only

review_body_text: I've have been in many call center before This is the best so far Dont listen what people say, but follow what you like to do Bieng a customer service, you are been given a task to listen and solve people problem. It might sound strees, but here you have a family of whole ccc to help you to beat stress and change stress into happiness to your customer. Take care your attitude, your mc and put effort then you may get get permanent faster.
cons_text: Difficult to be absorb into permanent

review_body_text: This job will build your communication skill. Day by day you will learn how to deal with a lot of customers and you may learn how to use Microsoft Office perfectly

review_title: Team building and activities (especially makan makan activity)
review_body_text: All staff is like a family including bosses. Easy going, smooth flow BAU of wokplace. My job was a relaxing and non stress job (management supports) End my work daily ON TIME and going back home on time, no OT. Able to go for prayers on time.

review_title: Productive and dedicated team with secure corporate culture
review_body_text: I had working with strong dedicated team for analyst department on the retail product. I learn to reporting, compare, monitor, forecasting and control on certain bank product such as deposit and bancassurance. The most enjoyable part of this job is actual amount is approximate forecasting figure and significant change occur when the marketing plan is launch. The hardest part of the job is to change the data standard when internal reporting change format.
I have a good experience in sales and try approching skill in customer.I enjoy new experiance in banking line and meet good managment.A lot of thing i learn from banking line.

review_title: A good place to start career
review_body_text: A good place to start your career and learn about banking industry. Good support from management. An opportunity for career growth given by the management.

review_title: good experience, teamwork partner, nice environment work places
review_body_text: I got experience with Rhb banking group . Must achieve goal targets every month include insurance products & asb loans , marketing indoor&outdoor booth. independent & self motivation. All sales incentives earned will be directed to our sales and overall work performance

review_title: Fun workplace, very challenging, suitable for those who love to meet target.
review_body_text: I love the experience I got when I was in RHB, the enviroment is super good, feels like home. The higher management and staffs also friendly. The job itself is good, a bit stressful but manageable.

review_title: I really enjoy working in rhb bank
review_body_text: I managed all my work, clear all my work without pilling up. If don't know how to do willing to ask and learn from others. Like to ask alot of question.

Working hours for this job can be long as there is the day for everyone need to attend an event and so on. The experience i get for working for this company are the communications between different ages and trying to get what people needs. The management from the region office are a little bit cranky and sometimes over the limit. I enjoyed my stay in Branch a lot and meeting very nice co-workers. The hardest part is when you are trying to adapt with the characteristic of each customer and people that you dealing with. The most enjoyable part of the Job is when you achieved the target every month sales and the incentives are very good.
Maximizing collection effort to meet the productivity and collection targets set by management. To support unit head, section head amd head of collection strategy to manage the portfolio health.

As a treasury executive, i deal with many customers who wish to convert their currencies to use in the export or import. I have to do a lot of researchers before advising a customer to either buy or sell a currency. That was the most toughest part in my job.
Everyday is busy day,i learned about new things about my job from manager,the workplace is fun to work,the hardest job is to get the customer, the enjoyable is teamwork between colleagues.
I love the environment and enjoy it very much. My boss was very kind. Our team leader is fun and sporting. I love my friends. Their management is so cool.

Every day i must be at office before 8:45am, so i will go out to work from my place at around 7:30am with public transport and i will arrived at office around 8:00am. my daily office hour 8:45am till 5:45pm, but must to stayback every day till 9:00pm. on saturday are required to working till 1:00pm. while on end of month are required to working on weekend. But i really love it this workplace culture because i must to challenge my self to achieve every month.
had a so much fun with the staff and team leader , management also arrange many activities with the staff , and highest commission working here. also have a over time paid.

the workplace culture in rhb is very good with nice people and good team work. for me workplace culture is very important Culture is a powerful element that shapes your work enjoyment, your work relationships, and your work processes. But, culture is something that cannot actually see, except through its physical manifestations in workplace. i'm very happy doing my internship at rhb

Not a normal working hour job as you need to push yourself to achieve monthly target set by the company but this way helps you earn more and grow more as staff and pushes you to be the best. Provides insurances and medical card for employees. Free training classes for employees to gain knowledge in the banking industries.
cons_text: working on weekend, working until late nights.

review_body_text: - Banking environment -Learn on Telegraphic transfer between local and overseas bank -Fun colleagues -Low salary and don't get opportunity to transfer to other department to learn new things - Fixed 2 months bonus, benefits and annual leaves

the workplace at RHB have many benefit. i have learn more about the bank product. i also able to handle the customer with take a good care. that enhance my skills and knowledge from the past graduate.
A very good bank with very good staff and branch manager. Friendly working environment. Good team work. I enjoy working at RHB Bank Berhad at pelangi branch johor bahru

I start work with RHB BANK BERHAD on 01/03/1993 as a clerk and got promoted as an Officer to Operations Department in year 2000. I have attached to almost all the department with the bank. I choose to do sales in year 2005 which is more challenging. My highest achievement is as a top performance Personal Banker in the country in year 2009 & 2010. In year 2013 I have given opportunity to handle back office duties in commercial loan disbursement in HQ. Now I came back to sales job again which is currently demanding in market.
cons_text: Partners who directly involved with RHB BANK a bit pushing

review_body_text: RHB teach me become strong person, lead me to become professional, and grow up my thinker to become a rich thinking. Here i got a lot of good memories and good manner.

I learn a lot about customer service. everyday is a hectic day but still give me an enjoyable environment when I'm surrounded by nice people. In handling customer i learn how to be rational and not emotional. Everyday i will handle so much cases which is i need to make decisions quickly. Time is very important so i learn how to manage my time. the hardest part of my job when you are the middle person and every decision is on me, i need to make right decision for the customer and also everyday i need to listen to the customer that put their anger on me. sometime, staff are not willing to teach newbies like me.

Handling teller job is quite challenging and need lot of patients because we might encounter with different type of customer on daily basis. Cash handling is quite tough to handle as we need to ensure the cash is balance end of the day.
Its a good company. There is lot of room for improvement. I have great work live balance. There is room for improvement for the management and how they manages their people

For newcomers, the probation period will be 6 months.on the first to six months you need to achieve your monthly percentage of KPI. There will be a lot of roadshow that you might need to attend at least once a week.

most of the typical day at work is doing sale to achieve the target that has been set by RHB Bank. IAt RHB Bank, i learned so many knowledge in term of sales, service, how to handle problem, customer, services after sales and much more. im also learned how to increase my productivity in term of self confident, increase productivity level,increase knowledge about sales and product and much more. Workplace culture at RHB Bank is we are based on team work and helping each others. The hardest park at RHB Bank is to handle customer need and want, to sustain a good relationship with customer. The most enjoyable part in my job is when i can help customer to settle the problem.

I enjoy myself working here due to I need to marketing at any place I want. Its makes me like happily do work. I have learned how to talk with customer and approach with customer without shame. Some of them don't even give face to talk. So i have learned how to approach the customer. Workplace is awesome.

review_title: Call Centre Specialist in Credit Card
review_body_text: Friendly colleague. all day is hustle day especially within peak hours. Daily basis learn new things and how to work more efficient. time management is important for segregation time for rest, lunch, pray, etc. work culture is like assisting each other and team work hardest part is where not able to fully satisfied the customer requirement and and deliver good services Most enjoyable is where customer log a compliment
location: Menara AA Jalan Tun Razak Kuala Lumpur
pros_text: segregation of work for specific skillset
cons_text: not able to cross train with other skillset

review_body_text: Very friendly workplace & energetic surrounding. A lots of challenging task & target given. On the same time I have to manage staff & banking operation to ensure everything in a right path. But sometimes I have no time to balance my life due to lots of work to do.
pros_text: a lot of rewards for staff

review_title: Professional in work and friendly person
review_body_text: To obtain any position in fast growing and energetic company that seeks employer who possesses high stamina,show good leadership, creative, sklilful and have deep interest in learning and gaining new knowledge

Everyone was so helpful and friendly. Everyone is supporting each other and allows you to proudly express yourself without feeling insecure. In terms of work culture, everyone seems to be committed in delivering the best outcomes for the benefit of company.

base on my experience in baking industry mostly about the consistences of the workflow. Everyday there will be briefing before working time and mostly what I have learned is about not making mistakes. The hardest part of this job is archiving monthly target.

review_title: Its actually best place to learn new thing
review_body_text: Im working at RHB since 2008 and i have learn alot of thing and it takes alot of effort and im having fun. But the management was quite racist and im having difficulty as need to struggle. But overall for learning and working everything is fun

review_title: place to gain more knowlege in banking field
review_body_text: It is fun to work in this place as all the colleagues give full guidance and support in order for me to learn the job scope. Besides, the management is very good and always assures in providing good and prompt service
location: Overseas union garden jalan klang lama

review_body_text: Fun working hours. But it stressful regarding target and monthly review. Have a fun teammate whomsupporr each other in order to achieve our monthly target for branch.
Underwent a Corporate and Investment Bank Associate programme. Equipped us with relevant on-the-job experiences as well as classroom trainings and presentation skills.

review_title: This is a good place to learn about compliance
review_body_text: Marketing & Communications practitioner will face challenges here as she is not a risk-taking place. Bank protects her customer but limits creativity.
Yes,indeed workplace is good but for future is not really suitable.I got a lot of things learn there is friends and my skill also develop and get new experience.
Exciting work, organised and growing. Good people Quiet atmosphere. I had an assistant who was kins. Felt important. Liked the work very much. Was able to deliver on requirements.
pros_text: Stability and lots of training and development

review_body_text: Management is good but the working time so difficult . Sometimes Sunday also have to go to work Normal working days have to stay until 9clk but no overtimes salary given.
A platform made simple for everyone to trade. Easy to understand and help is just a click away if troubleshooting is needed. Easy access to online information.
pros_text: A platform made simple for everyone to trade.
cons_text: The company is at a distance.I

review_body_text: Very fun workplace. Good place to gain financial product and services knowledge. Work life balance is applicable in this company. Remuneration is quite good.

Good company to start career with. Learn a lot in banking and public relations sectors.The most enjoyable about this job is when the working time is over that means you are totally free because no need bring the job at the home. The environment quite stress because need fulfill all the customers needs.
> Five day working > Good management > Team work > Friendly Colleagues > Enjoyable weekends > Saturday might be work (Customer Appointment) > Colleagues Trip > Flexible working hours

excited to work a day to day i learned more experience management very good culture okay hardest part to objection handling but its will learn as a more knowledge. the most enjoyable is as a telemarketing

review_title: Pleasant working place but poor financial rewards.
review_body_text: Friendly and healthy working environment but unfortunately the reward is not in line with target achievement. Very poor annual salary increment which become the main reason for high achiever to leave the bank.
I interested at this job. I will do the best performance at this company. I have experiance at rhb bank as a collection , invoicing clerk and insurances clerk.

The colleagues both senior and junior at RHB Bank are very helpful in terms of teaching and learning on my part in order to sell a diverse group of banking consumer products as well as the positive encouragement from the manager every morning during our daily briefings. Overall a wonderful experience.

review_title: Its a good workplace to gain knowledge
review_body_text: Its a very comfortable place to work but the mgmnt its a lil bit funny when it start merging with osk investment bank everything is going backwards.. overall ive learned ive gained a lot of knowledge and experience.. the reason im resining from my position is because of the distance from home to workplace... after got married ive move to seremban so i found out that is a lil bit hassle for me to travel down to kl everyday.i think the way for me to work and gain money is to work from home.. ill b more productive..overall i still love the company is just that distance make us apart.
cons_text: Distance its far from my new house

review_title: A stepping stone for customer service environment
review_body_text: Great colleagues with good work environment. A good exposure of a banking line. I have realized my passion towards handling customers through this job.
I started my banking career at RHB in sales team and learned a lot in sales. RHB having their own training center in Bangi and excellent training and coaching were provided .

review_title: full of mission and vision to achieve target
review_body_text: I bring along 20 years of experience in banking line as teller to customer service officer. My experience consist of various clerical to management activities such as documentation,authorization,dealing with customers,auditing and many more. With my knowledge and my personal drive, I believe I can content and excel in my future task. I offer you a hard working spirit, a fast adapt to your working environment and mutual characteristics in order to drive and achieved your corporate goal. I can be a very good asset to your organization for I am a self-starter and extremely a fast learner. - Strong communication, negotiation and presentation. It’s always my intention to join an organization with excellent reputation and growth opportunities. I will be glad if you would consider my request for an interview to discuss this job opportunity at your convenience. Thank You. Sincerely Yours, NOORLELA BINTI MAT RAMLI (email : ellaramli74@gmail.com)
- Very bust daily routine - Management is too open about the organization - People are friendly - Learned how to review SME's

- Provided training when is needed. - Have learned taking responsibilities in completing the task. - Time management, organisational and planning are needed in taking this job. - Be a good team player as the work have to be done by team. - Communication skills very essential for achieving the company goals.
RHB is the good employment. The most enjoyable part of the job and enjoyable 7 days working banking experience via shopping mall.
Its a Challenging Place, Good learning ground as management encourage staff to go for training and hand on is available in UAT environment, and Friendly environment.
I have good experience especially to explain to customer how to do right or best way to remit they money..how to earn more fund from fixed deposit investment

review_title: Fun work place but worst management
review_body_text: Eventho you work there for 10years also They won't give you permanent job.Better find a new job...salary also problem.
cons_text: The building lift cause you always punch in late to work

review_title: Productive in sport, like to play futsal
review_body_text: A typical day at work is process customer personal loan i learn how to approach customer, process customer document. Management teach me how to learn by own self and make profit to the company My co-workers preferred work in team The hardest part of the job is being a customer service which is handle the customer problem The most enjoyable part of the job is I achieved the target sales of the company.

work every day include sat and sun I've learned how to handle customer, to solve their problem and using new system the management poor all co-worker is fun, happy and excellent every job is hardest, should try, but this job really make me happy everything is enjoyable with the event, friends, boss, supervisor, the environment was so good.
Awesome job that allows you to interact with a lot of people on a daily basis. chasing deadlines and testing your recordkeeping skills. its all fun and challenging at the same time.

review_title: i happy to work with the company
review_body_text: satisfy with the job good environment. i learned new business idea the management is good do marketing with team approach customers sales product 100 % target

early starting work we have briefing and sharing the idea to get brainstorming, have a lttle game such as 15 minutes to get our spirit or energy to give strong mental. ni management and friendly working.
pros_text: have pantries to make it drink and save food

review_body_text: When I worked here, i learn a lot of things when i worked here. we need to more focusing on how to solve customer problems and give fully committed in order talk with customer. In addition,
pros_text: this company provided with shuttle bus

review_body_text: This company have good remuneration. Environment also nice. Here I learn about management and the important of marketing.
Great experience working with RHB.Gain knowledge and valuable experiences.Opportunities always there for staff who wants to achieve better future in banking industries.

I am very hardworking. normal work as managers only from 9 am to 6 pm, Monday to Friday. but I always go back later and work from Monday to Saturday for planning strategy and spend the whole work. Before I became a manager, I only sales executive. I make my revered craft in the group and bosses. I received many certificates and trophies are awarded for great achievements. I learned there how the management of bank branches or offices. starting with finding staff, train them to use the system, teach them how to make sales, motivate staff, audit and more. The most difficult thing when sales targets are not achieved because of the facilities that limit. Where we have no system to make sales outside the area. The most interesting thing is I received salaries that were previously beyond my income 3 thousand per month, when in RHB my income is much higher, reaching nearly 10 thousand. but never more than 10 thousand. so I can afford to buy cars and homes. I have achieved many awards there.

Work with RHB is good experience for me because RHB is a big company and have their own culture that provide employer love work with RHB. They provide us a lot of training to make us more ready to real business banking and always ready to help customers. They also have a good management. The hardest part of the job is we try to give our best for our target. Even our target is high but we are ready to give our best to achieved the targets. The most enjoyable part of the job is our family cultures. we always support each other to make it our work place no pressure.

My day yo day routine was processing loan applicationi.e. prepare working paper and makesure loan was released accordingly. The hardest thing is competition among bankers and the best thing is when i satisfy my customer by providing them our best service.

review_title: good environment and can enhance carrier growth
review_body_text: -working on shift with 5 working days and 2 rest days. every day must log in systems 9 hours. in 9 hours that includes 1 hour break (meal break) and another 1 hours for auxiliary break (pray,smoking and others) -i learned to handled all kind of customer from simple to complicated problem. but i need to assist that all customer with professional and patient. I need to archive monthly Kpi every month as well. -every agent have their Team Leader(TL) or Team Manager. which is will guide and monitor our work productivity. -everyone knows that customer service is stress job especially with financial institution(bank) but environment and colleagues was help me a lot while working. this company have some event like dinner, hiking, aidilfitri event and other. its make us have good relationship not even with same level person in this company -hardest part in this job was i am working with different from my studies. far from any subject in my courses in university. but all this things only hard in the early of my carrier. i showed and proved that if people get a chance they will struggle and committed on any difficult task. same goes with jobs experiences. without chance we cant get experience -lastly, most enjoyable part for sure was satisfaction from customer after can settled and solved problem. include compliment from cust.
pros_text: provide annual leave, transport, meal allowances and public holiday allowances.

review_body_text: every day is a learning process I learned about company product and services and also interpersonal skill on how to deal with customers. Company has an excellent management. Easy to seek help from the co worker. The hardest part of job is it high control of mental to deal with different type of customer. Im most enjoy with this job because I can learn how to deal with my weakness and learn to overcome them.

Rotation shift working,many thing i learned when work here for example how to dealing with customer by face to face,improve skill communication and also level of confident when facing with customers. The management is good because of always share the up to date information with employee. The hardest part is have to deal with customer and we have to be more patient when deal with them.

I did enjoy everyday,as my workplace where in shopping mall. I had a chance to meet different people everyday which will lead to be my prospect. As a salesperson,u have to be very enthusiastic and be presentable.I always learn new things while dealing with customers.

working in a banking line is not easy especially in sales & marketing dept. Sometimes its hard to me to achieve certain target which bank gave it to me every month. Focus and challenge myself is the best qoutes to improve sales and my performances.

review_title: Good and exciting relationship among superior and subordinates
review_body_text: -the most longest years of company I have been with. -fun and excitement years -open for any advancement moves within company -experienced once to best marketers in my region

review_title: Taking care of the Organization's physical asset records.
review_body_text: Managing assets records for RHB Group. Monitor write off and transfer of assets . Taking stock of assets in the store. Disposal of obsolete assets.

My work basically answering people's queries and generally help them to address any problems they're having. Sometimes we also manage and do some maintenance to customer account and profile. My responsibilities are similar to bank tellers, counting money, cashing checks and servicing accounts.

review_title: Great places for fresh graduates to gain experiences as customer services agents.
review_body_text: I have learns and gain many things and experiences at RHB as customer service agents. To be a CSA u need to have a very good communication skills and a high level of patience because a CSA is an image of the company itself. Of course u will have a bad experiences such as being call stupid by the customers or others, but it is good for myself because i can adapt the situation and learn from past mistake and build up my confidents, furthermore i have gains a lot of information and knowledge about banking.
pros_text: Great places for fresh graduates to gain experiences.

review_title: Productive and good environment workplace with our own workstation
review_body_text: 5 1/2 working days plus Saturday n Sunday on end of month every month if purpose. Learn how to manage time and talk with people gentlely, also had a cheerful and friendly officemate. he hard part is the working time, sometimes over the working limit till 13 hours per day . The work situation in happinest and cheerful moments with the open minded and sporting senoirs.

i have chances to expose different industry eg: agricultural, food manufacturing, furniture manufacturing, construction, apparel and etc when i go for site visit. i work closely with AVP of our regional corporate banking, she has taught me lots of knowledge of banking loan and documentation, credit analysis and review.
Adaptive environment. Don't just be satisfied with the achievement you've accomplished, need to push it to another level. Nice and strategic place to work.

review_title: Company is generally rated as good
review_body_text: Generally, the company has a clear line of reporting & individual responsibility. Staff are cooperative and helpful and quite a conducive place of work. Company is considered caring in certain aspects with considerable benefits to staff.
work under pressure turn complaint into compliment communication skill time management fun workplace team work good environment

My task is to find a customer in order to achieve my target given by my branch manager everyday. I have learn a lot while in RHB especially dealing with customers. All RHBians were given an apportunity to express their own ideas. The hardest part is waiting customer's document. It took along time. The most enjoyable part of being Personal Banker is everybody in the bank help each other to achieve the target.

Everyday is important to us. One day we loss we will have a lot loss to cover back for the next day. Working here give me lot knowledge how to control our expenditure, our debt, our affordability to keep survive every singe of day. But our management not very good, they never keep what they are promise, always be changed in what they are planning. They just care about the target but never give the solution and help s to achieve the target . We need to work over time but not paid. We are working in team so our teamwork very good.
pros_text: have team work, place of prayer, have commision
