cons_text: No life balanced, need to work overtime but not paid

review_title: Persistent and flexible to work in a time constraints.
review_body_text: Good verbal communication to interact with clients Excellent questioning and investigation skills Good Management system
It is a great journey alomost 9 years which lead me to learn from the Telemarketing to Project Office. A productive working place.
The most enjoyable part of the job is that you have friendly co workers and there are opportunity to learned, if one is willing to take up
do taxation personal do taxation company do report acount for company set up file learn about job secretrial learn about how to registration company name

-9 to 5 working hours. -can learn to ensure that the work can be dealt with appropriately and quickly. -boss too urgent to set up something as soon as possible. -personal-workers can not talk because I work too much. -kena complete a job in 2 minutes if you want to go home early. -There end bonus and every 3 years.
pros_text: bonus end year and every 3 years.

review_body_text: Steep learning curve with abundance of exposure. Colleagues are helpful and experienced. Opportunity to learn from seasoned and experienced professionals.
job_title: Fixed Income Principal Dealership and Trading

review_title: A great place to work in.
review_body_text: A great place but need some improvement on human capital handling. In handling people, it is not a trial and error game but more on human sensitivity and empathy. Motivation and coaching instead of dictatorial leadership should be instilled to create a better working environment. Furthermore, recognition should be given based on performance and merits of the individual NOT otherwise.
Good environment and enjoy to work. Besides that, many experiences i had learned. Good quality of management.Very good culture in this organization.

I learned many things when I was with RHB bank such as improving communication skills, decision making, strategic planning and etc. management and co- worker are friendly. i would recommend for fresh graduate to apply this job

i have very nice environmnet working in rhb. i ave also learn more n gain knlwledge abt how mortgage collection. i have also have lots of hepfull friends and team leader who ill help me always when i need them in job .
pros_text: once we archeive uit head ill give lunch

review_body_text: A nice place to work with a sporting and supportive team-mates. I learnt a lot about team-work and how important it is in our organization. Besides the heavy workload, i managed to lead a team to perform during the company big events and contributes good reputation for the company in sport events.

Conducting training and managing programmes are the daily routine. From time to time, we review training programmes and developed new ones to fulfil the growing needs of the banking group. The interesting thing is we meet new people from everyday. The team is great, very hardworking in ensuring all the programmes planned for the year run smoothly.
pros_text: Opportunity to learn new knowledge everyday

review_body_text: Good management and environment, a well place to learn and gain experience.Work in credit sector which provide me knowledged to know how the system work in our daily live expecially when you want to purchase a property

review_title: Stress but can learn a lot
review_body_text: work long hours but no overtime payment, violate worker regulation rules in Malaysia. More than 8 hours of working plus working on sunday is must.

Working with this company is one of the best experience i had. Our bosses are friendly but strict and team leader kept support me and very caring . The only thing that is hard is the timing. we had to stayed till 830pm .

I loved my previous job. It taught me so many things and my previous boss has always been helpful. I always enjoy doing my job and the hardest part of the job is I was transferred to KL because of centralization. I also quit because I want to experience new environment and broaden my horizon by working in a different company.
pros_text: lot of benefit such as staff loan, medical benefit for staff and family, etc
cons_text: My work place is to far from my house

review_body_text: - not easy to apply leave - i have learned a lot by the pass 5 years im working - lunch break less than 1 hour - all the staff are friendly - hardest part of my job is doing sales obviously i am not good in sales - most enjoyable part of my job is i have more experience when my manager ask me to do multi task job

review_title: good teammates and fun to work with.
review_body_text: good teammates and fun to work with yet need to be competitive to each other. sometimes it got quite stressful when it came to achieve targets. anyway it was all an exciting job and environment and i must say it was my favorite job environment so far despite of the internal politics.

Confident of facing new challenges with the experiences gained while working. To find a stimulating and challenging role with my excellent interpersonal, management and leadership skills to make a positive contribution and confidently lead a team.

Working with RHB Bank was a nice experience where i learned to enhance my communication skill and also manage myself to adapt with the customer service working style and job scopes. My co workers were very friendly and supportive and they taught me alot on this job scopes. It was a very good learning process after I completed Sijil Pelajaran Malaysia.
This bank has potential to grow however staff retention is very minimal. One of the best medical benefits in town for employees.

review_title: A great place to learn and work if the team members are corporative and passionate about their duties
review_body_text: Very productive and demanding position - with long hours of work. With the corporation of the fellow colleagues it often was a fun place on an average day. Certain times of the month could be crucial in trying to meet datelines. The team work and the organising of indoor events were the most enjoyable and memorable time.
pros_text: Medical coverage for the immediate family and staff member
cons_text: Long working hours not supported with payments

review_body_text: Working time 8.45-5.45pm, learned closing sales and sales marketing, management are well manage on sales staff, colleagues are friendly and workable, hardest part is to achieve sales target and most enjoyable hit the highest commission and travel with companies employees
- Works extra hours - Cooperative with other staff - Teamwork - Hardest part - turn around time (have to work faster) - Enjoyable part -- work as team
Learn to communicate with all level of customer.. Able to multitasking. work more than 13 hours per day Learn extra mile with senior. Able to handle most pressure situation.

it is a Very challenging job and nice environment. This company very potential. You work more then you get more return. can know new people and chat with them regarding everything they wanna share with us.

In my experience with RHB I learn to be positive and take things as a challenge . I believe when we have a positive attitude toward our organization we can face theAny difficulties , problems , obstacles ,hurdle or barrier can be overcome .
I LIKE THIS WORK SALES . MANAGER GOOD HEART AND LIKE FOR HER NEW ZEAL FOR STAFF AND ALWAYS GOOD FOR TUTORING . Search a new customer every day to buy RHB product . For example ASB loan

Working with RHB Bank as Sales Executive give me challenges experience. I learned about strategies and how to conviences costumer about company product. My co-workers like family to me. The hardest part of the job is to archive the montly target. The most enjoyable part of the job during paid.

review_title: I believe that my strong banking, finance and collection experience namely in Price Solutions SdnBhd (Standard charted Bank), HSBC Bank (M) Berhad, AM
review_body_text: With a Ten (10) years experience in Banking Line, I have a full understanding of administrating,managing organization and credit line. Moreover I had involved in special project in creditdepartment. Other than that, I have a very good computer skills

review_title: Productive and working as a team.
review_body_text: The environment is great but there is no work/life balance. Working as a team is the best part in here. Monthly incentive is the target. However, there is some cases the incentive will be hold or forfeited. It doesn't sound fair to all of the staff that have given their best.

review_title: a lot of event will arrangement and do it.
review_body_text: i like to work because talk with different of person and solve the problems.

review_title: Travel in order making sales about bank product
review_body_text: Able to participate in team work. Able to achieve daily target. Hardest part is facing the customers problem. The most enjoyable part is I can travel anywhere but in the same time we need to find our sales.

review_title: Challenging but Fun Place to work
review_body_text: - Responsible for quantitative and qualitative analysis of loan and credit line applications and other requests including annual review of existing client’s facilities. - Responsible for analyzing financial information and accessing credit worthiness and risk of a portfolio of commercial companies with gross turnover of RM80-RM100mil/year) - Understand my clients' business in terms of financial, management and their future prospective. - I am a team player, and having maintained good relationship with my colleagues and line managers. - So far, I enjoyed my job because I will be able to learn a lot from my job and people that I am working with.
pros_text: Great learning place and great people to work with
cons_text: Coundn't name any as far as I know, I enjoyed my job

review_title: One of the top 5 bank due to government back up
review_body_text: One of the top 5 bank in Malaysia. Unfortunately top management change few times and as a result to that the bank has"duplicate" departments which caused time frame for approval in may ways.It is still one of the "anchor" bank in Malaysia due to the government back up through the government link company - Employee Provident Fund (EPF) as the major shareholder of the bank. The bank does not compensate the workers so well and as a result to that many good workers had left the bank. I dont have any good or enjoyable time with the bank except my work satisfaction setting up a new business center and led the center to be the new best branch in 2009.
pros_text: Still among the top 5 bank in Malaysia due to the government back up
